tasks.desc: Installing lamps should make it easier to see
Then we can barricade the windows
Placing some flowers would make it harder to move
And then we can dig a moat
We might need to reupholster them again...
Let's place this metal can on top of a door
A bucket filled with water will work as well
Check behind the walls for cameras
Looks like we need to fix the walls
Let's clean the windows so we can see outside
Put some glue on the windowsill
Add some vases on the shelves
Lots of dust after all this work!
Let's check the floor for any footprints
Take the parts from the floor
Install the horn and the stylus
